query.text: declare @unit varchar(128), @custID nvarchar(64), @vcID varchar(33), @c varchar(33), @m varchar(33), @i varchar(33), @controller varchar(128), @e nvarchar(4000) select @custID = '%#20$' + rtrim(@ma_kh) + '%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end select @vcID = case when @type = '1' then 'PK1' when @type = '2' then 'HD9' else 'PN9' end select @i = case when @type = '1' then 'i11$' when @type = '2' then 'i29$' else 'i39$' end select @m = replace(@i, 'i', 'm'), @c = replace(@i, 'i', 'c') + '000000' select @controller = case when @type = '1' then 'GLTran' when @type = '2' then 'JRTran' else 'JPTran' end, @e = 'a.stt_rec not in (select stt_rec_ct from d12$000000)' &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; if not exists(select 1 from #_f where [alias] <> '') select @e = replace(@e, 'a.', '') exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @vcID, @c, @m, @i, 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, '', @custID, 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_ps_no_nt,ma_nt', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_ps_no_nt,ma_nt', '', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1, 2', '0', @unit, 0, 0, @e, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
